name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state

Init == state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = "idle"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
    /\ \A j \in 1..N : state[j] # "critical"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Subset

VARIABLES state, participants, votes, coordinator, decision

TypeOK == /\ state \in {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}
        /\ participants \in Subset(1..N)
        /\ votes \in [1..N -> {"Yes", "No", "Pending"}]
        /\ coordinator \in 1..N
        /\ decision \in {"Commit", "Abort", "Pending"}

Init == /\ state = "Init"
        /\ participants = {}
        /\ votes = [i \in 1..N |-> "Pending"]
        /\ coordinator \in 1..N
        /\ decision = "Pending"

Prepare == /\ state = "Init"
          /\ state' = "Prepared"
          /\ participants' = 1..N
          /\ votes' = [i \in 1..N |-> "Pending"]
          /\ decision' = "Pending"

VoteYes == /\ state = "Prepared"
          /\ \E i \in participants : votes[i] = "Pending"
          /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![i] = "Yes"]
          /\ state' = "Prepared"
          /\ decision' = "Pending"

VoteNo == /\ state = "Prepared"
          /\ \E i \in participants : votes[i] = "Pending"
          /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![i] = "No"]
          /\ state' = "Prepared"
          /\ decision' = "Pending"

Commit == /\ state = "Prepared"
          /\ \A i \in participants : votes[i] = "Yes"
          /\ state' = "Committed"
          /\ decision' = "Commit"

Abort == /\ state = "Prepared"
          /\ \A i \in participants : votes[i] = "No"
          /\ state' = "Aborted"
          /\ decision' = "Abort"

Next == Prepare \/ VoteYes \/ VoteNo \/ Commit \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, participants, votes, coordinator, decision>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Null

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Fork ownership: forks[f] = p means fork f is held by philosopher p; forks[f] = Null means fork f is free *)
(* Philosopher states: state[p] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

TypeOK == 
    /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \/ Null]
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Init == 
    /\ forks = [f \in 1..N |-> Null]
    /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Hungry(p) == state[p] = "hungry"

FreeFork(f) == forks[f] = Null

LeftFork(p) == IF p = 1 THEN N ELSE p - 1
RightFork(p) == IF p = N THEN 1 ELSE p + 1

CanEat(p) == 
    /\ Hungry(p)
    /\ FreeFork(LeftFork(p))
    /\ FreeFork(RightFork(p))

TakeForks(p) == 
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(p)] = p, ![RightFork(p)] = p]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"]

PutForks(p) == 
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(p)] = Null, ![RightFork(p)] = Null]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"]

HungryAction(p) == 
    /\ state[p] = "thinking"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "hungry"]
    /\ forks' = forks

EatAction(p) == 
    /\ CanEat(p)
    /\ TakeForks(p)

LeaveAction(p) == 
    /\ state[p] = "eating"
    /\ PutForks(p)

Next == 
    \E p \in 1..N :
        \/ HungryAction(p)
        \/ EatAction(p)
        \/ LeaveAction(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariants *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(1..K) \cup {<<>>}
  /\ head \in 1..K
  /\ tail \in 1..K
  /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueues an item *)
Enqueue(item) == 
  /\ size < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, item)
  /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED head

(* Consumer action: dequeues an item *)
Dequeue == 
  /\ size > 0
  /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
  /\ size' = size - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<q, tail>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \/ \E item \in 1..K : Enqueue(item)
  \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Servers

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state



TypeOK ==
  /\ currentTerm \in Nat
  /\ votedFor \in {None} \cup Servers
  /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = None
  /\ state = Follower

(* Candidate starts election *)
StartElection ==
  /\ state = Follower
  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
  /\ votedFor' = Self
  /\ state' = Candidate
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* Receive vote request *)
ReceiveVoteRequest(term, candidate) ==
  /\ state' = Follower
  /\ IF term > currentTerm THEN
       /\ currentTerm' = term
       /\ votedFor' = candidate

       /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* Receive vote response *)
ReceiveVoteResponse(term, voteGranted) ==
  /\ state = Candidate
  /\ IF term > currentTerm THEN
       /\ currentTerm' = term
       /\ votedFor' = None
       /\ state' = Follower

       /\ IF voteGranted THEN
            (* Count votes; if majority, become Leader *)

              /\ state' = Leader

              /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

            /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* Count votes for current term *)
CountVotes(term) ==
  (* Placeholder: actual vote counting logic needed *)
  1

Majority ==
  (Cardinality(Servers) \div 2) + 1

Next ==
  \/ StartElection
  \/ \E term, candidate \in Nat \cup Servers : ReceiveVoteRequest(term, candidate)
  \/ \E term, voteGranted \in Nat \cup {True, False} : ReceiveVoteResponse(term, voteGranted)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
